title: Playground Author Browser
concept: A browser-chrome redesign for Blueprint authors where Playgrounds behave like browser tabs, creation and saved management live in a bookmark shelf, and Site Manager opens as inline authoring drawers beside the active WordPress page.
focus: modal-free inline source, save, and management panels
dense controls with warm editorial accents
flows: Navigate the active WordPress site with refresh, path input, Homepage, and WP Admin controls.
Start a new Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, or gallery shortcut.
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with visible file-copy progress.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open, rename, and delete actions.
Author and run Blueprints with file browsing, JSON editing, copy link, download bundle, URL run, and gallery filters.
Use Site Manager drawers for settings, file browser, database, logs, export, and import without modal overlays.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
edit WordPress, PHP, and language settings
understand destructive reset and reload behavior
use File browser with create folder, create file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
